description: The F80 M3 ditched the E92's V8 for a return to straight-six power. To compensate for the loss of two cylinders, BMW's signature straight-six gained twin turbochargers to produce 425 horsepower and 550 newton-meters of torque; 11 horsepower and 150 newton-meters more than the 4.0-liter S58 V8. In the quest for better performance, this is the first M3 not to use natural aspiration.
creator: Macan
